name: stonksbot

evidenceGates.note: Strategy/backtest surface changed -> attach walk-forward + cost-sensitivity evidence before shipping (fires only after install-hooks.mjs and once the surface exists).

notes: PREPARATION PHASE - no bot code yet. This repo currently holds the agent harness, the TZ/contracts/ops planning layer, and a pointer to the Second Brain vault; implementation code starts only after an explicit request activates a component profile. verify.* are intentionally null so the post-edit hook no-ops for dormant profiles; harness/gate checks still exist via check-kit, test-gates, secret-scan, and evidence-gate. When a component profile is activated and real Python code lands, set verify.fast='ruff check . && pytest -q', verify.deep='pytest', verify.ship='pytest --maxfail=1 -q' and mirror them in AGENTS.md. ALL components are DORMANT profiles: no Python toolchain/dependency/build command for a dormant component may be introduced until an explicit request flips its status to active (component-guardian enforces - this is how 'prepare now, code from the current TZ later' is encoded). broadTaskTriggers extend the fan-out nudge with trading-domain terms (RU+EN). forbiddenTerms catch stack-name leakage from sibling agent-kits (web-frontend / desktop-GUI / 3D tooling) - stonksbot is a Python backend trading lab. The git hooks are installed and live: pre-commit and pre-push run on every commit/push (worktrees inherit the main repo .git/hooks). evidenceGates fire only after tools/install-hooks.mjs is installed and the strategy/backtest surface exists.
